name: OPENSURVEY
description: OPENSURVEYs mobile research APIs and SDKs for in-app surveys, NPS and panel sampling.

seo.title: OPENSURVEY — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: OPENSURVEY: OPENSURVEYs mobile research APIs and SDKs for in-app surveys, NPS and panel sampling.

when_to_use: In-app NPS survey via mobile SDK
Panel sampling API for market research data collection
Custom survey embedding in mobile product flows
Voice-of-customer data via in-app survey triggers
Real-time survey analytics for product feedback loops

pros: Strong panel access in Korean and APAC markets
APIs for NPS and CSAT automation
cons: APAC and Korea focus; limited Western panels
Not a product analytics tool; research-focused
SDK quality and docs uneven across platforms
review.verdict: Useful mobile research tool for APAC brands; not a replacement for product analytics or global survey platforms.
review.best_for: APAC mobile apps running in-app NPS, CSAT, or panel research with Korean audiences.
review.not_for: Western teams, product analytics needs, or global panel requirements.
